meanings.definition: the amount of electromagnetic radiation leaving or arriving at a point on a surface
emit a steady even light without flames
examples: The fireflies were glowing and flying about in the garden

meanings.definition: have a complexion with a strong bright color, such as red or pink
examples: Her face glowed when she came out of the sauna

meanings.definition: shine intensely, as if with heat
examples: The coals were glowing in the dark

meanings.definition: experience a feeling of well-being or happiness, as from good health or an intense emotion
